case_title: PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. PABLO CESAR AQUAVO CRUZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, PABLO CESAR AQUAVO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-10-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

RETURNED MAIL: NITICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED= RETURN TO SENDER, VACANT, UNABLE TO FORWARD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED SEP-26-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, PABLO CESAR AQUAVO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUZ, PABLO CESAR AQUAVO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
